name: SomeIpGetSourcePort
title: SomeIpGetSourcePort
description: This function returns the source port (UDP/TCP).

parameters.name: Note This function can only be called within the OnSomeIpMessage callback function.

return:
Source Port
In the Event of an error, the function returns the value 0. The SomeIpGetLastError function can then be used to check whether the value is valid or an error has occurred.
